title: Sanding Block 4 Pieces Sanding Sponges Blocks Pads with 4 Grits (60/100/150/220) Coarse/Medium/Fine/Superfine Wet and Dry Dual-use Abrasive Pads Washable and Reusable sandpaper for Wood Walls Metal
features: 【Package Included】Our sanding block features 4 adjustable grit surfaces. The 4 sanding blocks have 4 different grits: (60#:120-180), (100#:240-320), (150#:400-500), (220#:800-1000). Different grits suitable for different uses.

【Durable & Long-Lasting】The sanding blocks are made of high-quality sponge and emery materials, acid and alkali resistant, sturdy and durable, not easy to break. Each sanding block measures about 3.94 x 2.76 x 0.98inch, easy to grip and use.

【Dual-Sided Grit Design】Our sanding sponge blocks are not only suitable for polishing dry surface of the object, but also available for wet surface because the sponge have good water absorption, which means it can keep polishing with water.

【Reusable】These sanding blocks are washable and reusable, they are very convenient to clean after using, you can rinse them with water directly. Perfect for DIY home repairs, furniture refinishing, auto body work, and craft projects.

【Widely Use】The sanding blocks are suitable for many kinds of surfaces such as wood, paint, metal, plastic or wall. Each specification is printed on the sanding blocks and it is recommended to use according to the polishing requirements.
description: 4/8-Piece Sanding Sponge Set – Multi-Grit Sanding Blocks for Smooth, Professional Finishing! Tired of uneven sanding or constantly switching between sheets? Our 8-Piece Sanding Sponge Set provides everything you need for a flawless finish on wood, drywall, metal, and more! Each sponge features a dual-sided grit design (60/80/100/120/180/220), allowing you to tackle rough shaping to fine polishing with ease. Why Choose Our Sanding Sponges? ✅ Faster Than Traditional Sandpaper – No more folding or tearing sheets; just flip the sponge for a new grit! ✅ Less Mess & Dust – Sponge material minimizes airborne particles (use wet for even cleaner results). ✅ Perfect for DIY & Pros – Great for woodworking, drywall repair, paint prep, metal polishing, and crafts. Ideal for: Furniture refinishing, drywall patches, auto bodywork, rust removal, and hobby projects.
